title: India’s first gourami fossil found in UP’s Siwalik foothills, reveals 4.8-million-year-old freshwater ecosystem
description: The presence of snakeheads, gouramis, and gobies shows a clear food chain, with smaller fish as prey and snakeheads as predators.

title: How to eat an elephant: fossil find in Tanzania shows oldest signs of butchering these giant mammals
description: Evidence of hominins butchering huge animals suggests that our human ancestors lived in big social groups.

title: Extragalactic archaeology reveals chemical evolution of giant spiral galaxy
description: Scientists have traced the chemical fingerprints in the gas of a galaxy designated as NGC 1365 to trace its evolution. The approach introduces a new field of extragalactic archaeology.

title: Steam: Ancient city builder launches with 96% positive reviews and introductory discount
description: Deal | Nova Roma launched in Early Access on Steam on March 26 and is available with a 20% introductory discount until April 9. The city builder takes players to antiquity, where they build a Roman island settlement as the empire falls into decline.

title: By 2030, how much will data centers contribute to fossil fuel emissions? Scientists mapped it
description: It’s another news roundup! This time, we cover how, using data analytics – and ironically, some AI – a team at Cornell University has mapped the environmental impact of AI by state. They determined that, by 2030, the rate of AI growth in the U.S. would put an additional 24 to 44 million metric tons of carbon dioxide into the atmosphere.
